question.text: Cross-currency futures contracts have which contract cycle?

answer.text: 12 serial monthly trading cycle only (no weekly contracts)

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Cross-currency futures (EURUSD, GBPUSD, USDJPY) have only 12 serial monthly contracts. Unlike INR-based pairs, they do NOT have weekly contracts. **The Trap:** Weekly contracts are available only for INR-based currency pairs, not cross-currency. **Cross-Exam Context:** Contract cycle differences are tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The absence of weekly contracts in cross-currency reflects lower trading activity compared to INR pairs.
